Horse_Description: Train them well and they will be great companions. Lives in the barn, ride from the stable.
HorseShoeCopper_Description: A rusted horseshoe made from copper. It might be worth reusing.
HorseShoeIron_Description: A strong horseshoe made from iron. It might be worth reusing.
HorseShoeGold_Description: A horseshoe made from gold. It might be worth reusing.
HorseManure_Description: Horse manure. Can be used as fuel or processed into fertilizer.
